title: msgmesriranjan/ResuMetrics-AI-Smart-Resume-Analyzer-ATS-Optimization-Engine
summary: ResuMetrics AI 是一款基于人工智能的简历筛选工具，利用大型语言模型和高级文本处理技术，解析简历，计算实时 ATS 兼容性评分，并提取关键技术技能，帮助求职者优化简历以适应 ATS 系统。，基于模型推理的架构
description: An AI-powered resume screening tool designed to help job seekers bridge the gap between their resumes and Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
